devnet_status.highlight: 6-client public devnet (32 nodes, 12h run) achieved consistent justification; finality gaps up to 45 min due to divergent recursive aggregation strategies across clients
12 Ethlambda + 12 Ream 24-validator devnet finalized up to 90,000 slots; ~30-slot finalization lag observed
Ream ARM compatibility issue and Zeam/Lantern Ziglip P2P interop bug identified; fix applied, devnet restart underway

aggregation_proposals.highlight: Zeam proposes two-level aggregation: Level 1 aggregates raw XMSS only (for safe-target calc); Level 2 aids proposers; removes Type 1 recursive aggregation from proposal pipeline
Zeam proposal increases slot intervals from 5 to 8 (×0.8s = 6.4s slots); 4 intervals reserved for block building and Type 2 aggregation
Ethlambda doc: first two optimizations are client-side only; third changes SignedBlock format and requires spec update if adopted; achieved 200ms publish time with 3 attestations

fast_finalization.highlight: Anshal proposes implicit vote propagation: validators who voted for block B implicitly voted for ancestor A; modifies process_attestations to credit ancestor targets, reducing finalization gaps
Memory tradeoff: accumulating implicit votes scales with justifiable slots (bounded ~O(sqrt)) × validator count; block size impact needs evaluation

cryptography_binary_fields.highlight: New 'Flock' paper (Starkware + Benedict Bunz/Espresso): binary field proving system, ~600 Blake3 hashes/sec proved, ~2× slowdown vs Poseidon; candidate to replace Poseidon entirely
Thomas working on XMSS circuit throughput in Binius64 repo; Emil working on LeanVM-b (LeanVM with binary fields + Blake3)

client_updates.highlight: Lantern: early block-build optimization (build in final interval of previous slot) live in public image; shadow simulator image compatible with Camille's lean shadow fuzzer
Ethlambda: history pruning reworked (statediff + snapshots every 1,000 blocks); P2P ported to Rust; proposal proof computation disabled to reduce latency
Gean: fixed configurable attestation committee count rejection bug; spec synced to lean spec head including attestation source and vote filtering changes

action_items.action: Investigate and update Hive — currently failing due to old spec version
Confirm availability of official Ream ARM-compatible image for multi-client devnet

decisions.decision: Spec to remain stable (no new features); only bug fixes and performance improvements targeting DevNet 5 readiness
Continue long-running multi-client devnets (targeting week+ duration) while testing Zeam and Ethlambda aggregation optimizations in coming weeks

targets.target: Zeam: shadow sim analysis with 16–32 node network + Camille's visualization tool — presented next call
Zeam two-level aggregation proposal: tested and results shared by next call
